allow: Bash(sed -i 's/class=""bg-white text-brand-red px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold hover:bg-brand-lightgray transition-colors whitespace-nowrap""/class=""inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1 bg-white text-brand-red px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold hover:bg-brand-lightgray transition-colors whitespace-nowrap""/g' "$f")

Bash(sed -i 's/class=""bg-brand-green text-white px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold hover:bg-green-600 transition-colors whitespace-nowrap""/class=""inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1 bg-brand-green text-white px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold hover:bg-green-600 transition-colors whitespace-nowrap""/g' "$f")
Bash(sed -i 's/<i class=""fas fa-phone mr-1""><\\/i>Call Now/<i class=""fas fa-phone""><\\/i>Call Now/g' "$f")
Bash(sed -i 's/<i class=""fab fa-whatsapp mr-1""><\\/i>WhatsApp/<i class=""fab fa-whatsapp""><\\/i>WhatsApp/g' "$f")
